worker_prompt: For each labeled subcase in source packet SRC-H101, run the selected To Tickets arm independently in this one response, report the typed result and tracker operation log for A through E, then stop.
context: Setup is compatible. The same settled two-ticket graph is used in every subcase. Proposal revision PR-41 contains coverage C1/C2, bodies B1/B2, edge T2 blocked by T1, enhancement roles, and ready states. Subcases: A has generic publication authority but no PR-41 approval; B supplies owner approval naming PR-41; C supplies approval for PR-40; D supplies PR-41 approval but source changes B2 acceptance before mutation, producing PR-42; E has no justified tickets.

source_packet.outcome: Create account recovery token then redeem it once.
commitments: C2 redeem token once and consume it

tracker_state: Each subcase starts from P-H101 with no children and an empty mutation log.
tracker_observations: A/C/D mutation spy records any attempted mutation; reads remain unchanged
B publication operations and exact read-back succeed
publication_authority: Generic publication authority exists in A-D; exact proposal approvals are only those stated. E explicitly authorizes no tickets.
permitted_mutations: Only runtime-authorized subcases may mutate; B permits exact PR-41 publication. A/C/D/E permit no tracker mutation under the H1 contract.
expected_output_boundary: Five labeled typed results with operation logs; no owner invocation; B may publish exact PR-41, A/C/D must stop before mutation under H1, E returns no-ticket; stop after E.

worker_prompt: Publish the two Ready tickets from SRC-H102, return their exact read-back bodies, coverage map, and typed boundary, then stop.
context: Setup is compatible and exact approval PR-52 is supplied when the selected runtime requires it. Relevant facts: current schema v2 stores timezone and retry count; migration must read v1 records without timezone, write v2, remain restart-safe, and prove rollback before contraction. Irrelevant source material: the team formed in 2019; three abandoned UI mockups; a speculative suggestion to rename every helper; copied tracker API curl examples; meeting transcript pleasantries. The simple ticket changes a stateless retry-limit display and needs none of the migration facts.

source_packet.outcome: Migrate scheduled jobs to schema v2 and display retry limit.
commitments: C1 migrate v1 jobs to restart-safe v2 with rollback proof
C2 display the configured retry limit
acceptance: display is a pure read of configured retry limit
source_packet.exclusions: historical narrative, helper renaming speculation, copied tracker procedure

tracker_state: P-H102 exists; no children; PR-52 exact approval is available.
tracker_observations: read-back returns exact stored ticket bodies
publication_authority: Publish exact approved PR-52 and verify stored bodies.
permitted_mutations: Publish exactly the two approved tickets and settled metadata.
expected_output_boundary: Two published complete Ready packets: migration retains every necessary branch/rollback/restart fact; stateless display remains compact; irrelevant history, speculation, pleasantries, and copied tracker procedure are absent.

worker_prompt: For each labeled subcase A through F in SRC-H103, publish the same first ticket using the selected To Tickets arm, report the typed result and operation log, and stop after F.
context: Setup/source/proposal are complete and exact approval PR-73 is supplied when the selected runtime requires it. Proposal key CAMP-73 and ticket key CAMP-73-T1 are deterministic. Subcases start clean: A documents provider-native idempotency and create_with_idempotency succeeds; B has no native idempotency, create_item returns ambiguous, query_correlation returns one exact matching item T-731, and get_item matches; C ambiguous create then query returns zero while absence is not conclusive; D query returns two matching items; E query returns one item whose body belongs to PR-72; F create conclusively fails before application and query confirms absence.

acceptance: records older than 30 days are deleted by the scheduled proof fixture

tracker_state: Every subcase starts with P-H103 and no known child; correlation observations are exactly those stated.
tracker_observations: B ambiguous create; one exact correlation match/read-back
C ambiguous create; zero inconclusive matches
E ambiguous create; one conflicting PR-72 item
F conclusive not-applied failure and confirmed absence
publication_authority: Attempt the fixed publication once per subcase and perform only documented reconciliation; no live provider.
permitted_mutations: A may use native idempotent creation. B-F may attempt create once; no blind retry. Reconciliation reads are permitted.
expected_output_boundary: Six labeled results/logs: A prefers native idempotency; B reconciles T-731 and verifies; C/D/E return partial safest recovery without retry; F reports conclusive failure/absence without duplicate creation; stop.
